title: chamelum frigidum
intro: Chamelum frigidum, also known as White Chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which can help to calm digestive issues and reduce anxiety. The health benefits of Chamelum frigidum include its ability to aid in relaxation, improve sleep quality, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Chamelum frigidum can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
